remember: Explain the concept of development and its importance.
Describe the various types of development (economic, social, and political).
List the key indicators of development (GDP, HDI, etc.).
understand: Explain the role of the state in promoting development.
Describe the impact of colonialism on the development of Indian economy.
Analyze the differences between traditional and modern views of development.
apply: Apply the concepts of development to a real-world scenario.
Use case studies to explain the factors that promote or hinder development.
Evaluate the effectiveness of government policies in promoting development.
analyze: Analyze the relationship between economic development and social development.
Explain how globalization affects development in India.
Assess the impact of climate change on development in developing countries.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of development and its importance.
Describe the various types of development (economic, social, and political) and their inter-relationships.
Discuss the role of the state in promoting development in India.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of development and its importance.
Describe the various types of development (economic, social, and political) and their inter-relationships.
Discuss the role of the state in promoting development in India.
Explain how globalization affects development in India.
